'''Zubwen''' was a [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]]. Because of his height, well above-average for a Jawa, he was known as "the Tower." He belonged to [[Nebit/Legends|Nebit's]] tribe.

==Appearances==
*{{Film|IV}} {{1st}}
